problem id: 6617d3b0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  01001101 -> 00010100
  00000110 -> 00000000
  11111000 -> 10000011
  01000110 -> 00000000
  00101011 -> 10100000
  10100010 -> 00001010
  00011000 -> 00000000
  10101000 -> 10000010

query: 11000100
predicted answer: 00000000
